icd10_suggestions.reason: Transcript phrase 'low back pain' maps to ICD-10 M54.50.

cpt_suggestions.label: manual_therapy
cpt_suggestions.descriptor: Manual skilled procedures administered to one or more body regions, encompassing manual traction, joint mobilization, manual manipulation, manual lymphatic drainage, and specific soft tissue mobilization.
documentation_requirements: Clear diagnostic localized mapping of tissue restrictions, joint tracking impairments, or structural hypomobility grades.
Naming of precise anatomical segments treated (e.g., right glenohumeral joint, lumbar spine segments L4-L5).
Explicit specification of mobilization grades applied (Grades I through V) or specialized tissue stroke maneuvers used.
Immediate pre- and post-treatment reassessment of passive range of motion or tissue tension metrics to document physical efficacy.

billing_caveats.time_system: Governed by the standard CMS 8-Minute Rule parameters.

payer_specific_rules.medicare_part_b: Mandatorily requires manual, hands-on touch throughout the code runtime. Mechanical alternatives do not qualify.
payer_specific_rules.commercial_payers: Strict cap constraints often exist regarding total lifetime or annual manual therapy interventions per policy year.

ncci_conflict_risks: Triggers automatic NCCI PTP denials when combined with 97110 or 97530 on identical body regions. Requires Modifier 59 / XS only if executed on independent anatomical regions or distinct operational intervals.
Fully encompasses localized massage techniques; billing 97124 concurrently on the same region is forbidden.

cpt_suggestions.reason: Indicated when objective physical examination confirms structural joint hypomobility, restricted capsular patterns, localized myofascial trigger points, chronic muscular guarding, or post-surgical localized soft tissue adhesions.

soap_update.objective: No new objective findings detected from speech alone.
soap_update.assessment: Possible clinical impressions to review: Low back pain / musculoskeletal pain; Low Back Pain (M54.50).
soap_update.plan: Review therapy plan, skilled minutes, and documentation support for detected treatment themes.

billing_hints: Therapeutic activity or therapeutic exercise may be relevant if skilled intervention is documented.
Documented 'soft tissue work' may support Manual Therapy Techniques (97140).
latest_analysis.disclaimer: Rules-based detection requires clinician review before billing.

assistant_suggestions.title: Document Baseline Right Shoulder Status
assistant_suggestions.body:
Capture specific ROM, pain level, and palpation findings for the right shoulder before or early in treatment to establish a clear baseline for this newly addressed region.

AI-generated suggestions require clinician review before use.

assistant_suggestions.title: Clarify Relationship Between Low Back and Shoulder
assistant_suggestions.body:
Consider documenting whether the right shoulder complaint is related to the low back pain (e.g., postural compensation, referred pain) or a separate issue, to justify medical necessity for the shoulder intervention.

AI-generated suggestions require clinician review before use.

assistant_suggestions.title: Document Soft Tissue Intervention Details
assistant_suggestions.body:
Specify the soft tissue technique used (e.g., manual therapy, trigger point release), duration, pressure level, and patient response to establish the intervention clearly.
